title: Write Budget API Tests
description: Create comprehensive tests for the budgets API endpoints.
instructions:
Write tests that cover:
1. Creating a budget (happy path)
2. Creating budget with invalid amount (validation)
3. Getting budget status (spent vs limit)
4. Budget alerts when over limit
5. User isolation (can't see other user's budgets)

testCases.description: Happy path test for budget creation is implemented
Over-limit budget status test is implemented
